How to ?

Its not just mixing to ingredients, itll require software with at least a couple of thousands of lines of code. We could ask to get that software by the old developers, but I hardly think all of them has it, after all internet back-uping wasnt avaible and store the back up to today would probably be useless.

Still, I dont really know why we havent asked

But only thing they can help us with is perhaps the modeling software they had, no way they put time on giving a how-to.
